race.comment: BALLON D'OR (3) turned in a real eye-catcher at huge odds first-up over 1100m at Ballarat. Up in class and needed more ground here last start when safely held. Needs this trip now and draws a decent gate for a change. In the right race to bounce back to form. EIWANA TAMASHI (8) worked home steadily to get up for third when resuming over 1343m at Geelong four weeks ago. Lightly raced colt who is bound to improve with that run under the belt. SWIFT CIRCLE (10) whacked away without threatening for a midfield finish last time out over this course and distance in a BM70. Draws a far better gate this time. Fitter for two runs back from a break and will appreciate the drop in grade. ALZARO (13) was outclassed in town last start but very good at Pakenham the run prior. Can improve back in this more suitable contest. MR BUTT'S BOATS (5) drops in class and will be cherry ripe at the fourth run back from a spell.
